title: U.S.-China Summit Produces Little More Than Polite Words, but They Help
content: In a chilly relationship of mutual mistrust, staving off the prospect of a broader conflict between two superpowers counts as progress.

more_info.byline: By Steven Lee Myers and David E. Sanger

en_title: U.S.-China Summit Produces Little More Than Polite Words, but They Help
en_content: In a chilly relationship of mutual mistrust, staving off the prospect of a broader conflict between two superpowers counts as progress.

title: U.S. Allies Drive Much of World’s Democratic Decline, Data Shows
content: Washington-aligned countries backslid at nearly double the rate of non-allies, data shows, complicating long-held assumptions about American influence.
en_title: U.S. Allies Drive Much of World’s Democratic Decline, Data Shows
en_content: Washington-aligned countries backslid at nearly double the rate of non-allies, data shows, complicating long-held assumptions about American influence.

title: Poland Uses Water Cannons and Tear Gas as Tensions Rise at Belarus Border
content: Western leaders have accused President Aleksandr G. Lukashenko of Belarus of using migrants as weapons in an effort to pressure the European Union.

des_facet: Middle East and Africa Migrant Crisis

en_title: Poland Uses Water Cannons and Tear Gas as Tensions Rise at Belarus Border
en_content: Western leaders have accused President Aleksandr G. Lukashenko of Belarus of using migrants as weapons in an effort to pressure the European Union.

title: Europe Toughens Rules for Unvaccinated as Fourth Covid Wave Swells
content: Austria took the hardest line yet on Monday, beginning a lockdown aimed exclusively at those who are not inoculated, part of a pattern to make life harder for resisters.
en_title: Europe Toughens Rules for Unvaccinated as Fourth Covid Wave Swells
en_content: Austria took the hardest line yet on Monday, beginning a lockdown aimed exclusively at those who are not inoculated, part of a pattern to make life harder for resisters.

title: Biden and Xi meet amid economic and military tensions.
content: U.S. officials said the virtual summit on Monday was intended to reassure both sides that misunderstandings would not lead to unintended clashes.
en_title: Biden and Xi meet amid economic and military tensions.
en_content: U.S. officials said the virtual summit on Monday was intended to reassure both sides that misunderstandings would not lead to unintended clashes.

title: Blinken Heads to Africa as U.S. Tries to Avert Ethiopia Disaster
content: The conflict between rebels and the country’s government has already featured numerous alleged atrocities, and experts say it threatens the stability of all of East Africa.

des_facet: War Crimes, Genocide and Crimes Against Humanity

en_title: Blinken Heads to Africa as U.S. Tries to Avert Ethiopia Disaster
en_content: The conflict between rebels and the country’s government has already featured numerous alleged atrocities, and experts say it threatens the stability of all of East Africa.

title: A Young Syrian Is Buried, as E.U. Foreign Ministers Meet on Belarus
content: A confrontation at the Polish-Belarusian border, a funeral for a dead Syrian boy trapped in between and a new round of E.U. sanctions mark the struggle with Aleksandr G. Lukashenko.

more_info.byline: By Monika Pronczuk and Steven Erlanger
des_facet: Middle East and Africa Migrant Crisis

title: How a Dispute Over Groceries Led to Artillery Strikes in Ukraine
content: In a sign of volatile East-West relations, a dispute over shopping in the Ukrainian conflict zone spiraled into fighting that sent war jitters rippling through Europe and the U.S.
en_title: How a Dispute Over Groceries Led to Artillery Strikes in Ukraine

title: Shell proposes a shift to Britain, dropping ‘Royal Dutch’ from its name.
content: The restructuring is meant to make the company more appealing to investors and make it easier to sell assets, the oil giant said.

title: As Cuba Crushes Dissent, a Nationwide Protest Fizzles
content: In the days before the planned protest, the homes of government critics were surrounded by uniformed police officers, state security agents or government supporters holding picket signs, human rights activists said.
en_title: As Cuba Crushes Dissent, a Nationwide Protest Fizzles
en_content: In the days before the planned protest, the homes of government critics were surrounded by uniformed police officers, state security agents or government supporters holding picket signs, human rights activists said.

title: 2 Explosions Hit Ugandan Capital, Killing 3
content: Witnesses said there was a blast near a police station and another near Parliament, and the police said three suicide bombers also died.
en_title: 2 Explosions Hit Ugandan Capital, Killing 3
en_content: Witnesses said there was a blast near a police station and another near Parliament, and the police said three suicide bombers also died.

title: Plagues Strike Egypt: Sudden Floods, Then 4-Inch Scorpions Called Deathstalkers
content: Swept from desert burrows, hundreds, if not thousands, of scorpions skittered into villages, stinging at least 503 people.

title: Two Journalists Arrested as India Cracks Down on Media
content: Faced with sectarian violence in the country’s northeast, the government has responded by disputing reports on the clashes and punishing those who covered them.

title: Basque region restricts gatherings as cases rise again in parts of Spain.
content: The move contributes to a national debate on whether the country should reintroduce restrictions to prevent a Covid resurgence this winter.

title: Hong Kong exempts JPMorgan Chase’s chief from its lengthy quarantine.
